recipes.name: Pulihora
recipes.instructions: Cook rice. Prepare tamarind paste with tempering of peanuts and spices. Mix thoroughly.

recipes.name: Gongura Mutton
recipes.instructions: Sauté gongura leaves into a paste. Cook mutton with spices. Combine and simmer until oil separates.

recipes.name: Natu Kodi Pulusu
recipes.instructions: Marinate chicken. Fry onions and spices. Add chicken and poppy seed paste. Cook until gravy thickens.

recipes.name: Gutti Vankaya
recipes.instructions: Stuff slit brinjals with a roasted peanut-sesame paste. Sauté in oil until tender.

recipes.name: Andhra Pappu (Mamidi Kaya)
recipes.instructions: Pressure cook dal with mango pieces. Add a strong garlic and red chilli tempering.

recipes.name: Prawns Iguru
recipes.instructions: Fry prawns with onions and curry leaves until water evaporates. Add cashew paste for richness.

recipes.name: Tomato Pachadi
recipes.instructions: Sauté ingredients and grind into a coarse paste. Finish with a mustard and curry leaf tadka.
